Video.summary: When Reno witnesses the cold-blooded murder of one of his trusted street pals, Reno himself becomes the victim of a brutal beating at the hands of the killers.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: For Reno Raines, taking refuge in a small-town saloon becomes hazerdous.
Video.title: Eye Of The Storm

Video.summary: News reports of Lt. Enrique Vilas' escape from El Salvador are accompanied by offers of a $100,000 reward for his capture.
Video.title: La Mala Sombra

Video.summary: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.
Video.title: True Confessions

Video.summary: A dispatcher is blackmailed into undermining Hunter's and McCall's investigation of a gold robbery.
Video.title: The Pit

Video.summary: After a dispute over a repair bill, a young motorcycle mechanic is murdered in cold blood by a maniacal cutthroat.
Video.title: Mother Courage

Video.summary: A police detective aids in solving a series of murders connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.
Video.title: From San Francisco With Love

Video.summary: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.
Video.title: The Cradle Will Rock

Video.summary: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death
Video.title: High Noon In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer.
Video.title: Love, Hate And Sporty James

Video.summary: When the husband of a policewoman is murdered, Hunter and McCall suspect the woman's patrol partner.
Video.title: Partners

Video.summary: Reno's vacation in Las Vegas is derailed when Bobby enlists him to track down a bail jumper.
Video.title: Second Chance

Video.summary: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.
Video.title: The Rabbit And The Fox

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.
Video.title: No Good Deed

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.
Video.title: White Picket Fences

Video.summary: The romance between a devious 17 year old girl and a doctor gets out of hand when she murders his wife.
Video.title: Kid Stuff

Video.summary: A couple finds themselves in big trouble when their bizarre sex games go awry and a man is killed.
Video.title: Night Games

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ

Video.summary: In the moment before Reno apprehends a murderer,a helmeted motorcycle rider breaks up the party with a pistol.
Video.title: The Talisman

Video.summary: The pipe-bomb murder of Reno's ex-partner Jack Varnell sends Reno and Bobby south of the border in search of the cop-killer.
Video.title: Partners
